case_title: HENKEL, DEREK et al VS OLSON, PETER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENKEL, DEREK STRANDBERG, SOPHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLSON, PETER $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,522.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OLSON, PETER HEARING SET FOR AUG-08-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENKEL, DEREK STRANDBERG, SOPHIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OLSON, PETER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED UNSATISFIED, $.00 FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO: OLSON, PETER.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY HENKEL, DEREK STRANDBERG, SOPHIA AS TO DEFENDANT OLSON, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OLSON, PETER
STAY OF EXECUTION ON WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OLSON, PETER
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-08-2003, GRANTED
ORDER TO STAY WRIT SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.
ORDER TO RECALL WRIT ISSUED ON 7/10/03 SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE. NEW JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFT.
ORDER TO STAY WRIT SIGNED. SENT TO THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT.
ORDER TO RECALL WRIT, FILED. ORIGINAL ORDER TO THE SHERIFF DEPT.
